name: Incorrect Use of Privileged APIs
description: The product calls a privileged API without meeting its requirements, such as failing to validate argument assumptions, not accounting for API design weaknesses, or calling from an unsafe context. This can enable attackers to elevate privileges, hijack the process, or steal sensitive data.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL node invokes an EXTERNAL or AUTH node representing a privileged API without a CONTROL node that validates preconditions, verifies calling context safety, or enforces argument constraints. Look for privileged API calls made from untrusted contexts or with unvalidated parameters.
